'''Lanyss Gutierrace''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]].

==Biography==
She was [[Director of Personnel|Personnel Director]] of the Department prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], until a complaint from an [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] whom she rejected after he applied for a clerical job. After a four-month investigation turned up 36 similar cases, Gutierrace was suspended on charges of [[Humanocentrism]] and replaced with [[Tanu Aphidale]].

==Appearances==
